blocks.heading: Become a go-to resource
blocks.body: As a chapter lead, you’ll be seen as a leader and facilitator in your local AI scene.
citations: Local PDF · GenAI Collective Chapter Startup FAQ.pdf · chunk 05

blocks.heading: Your events are financially sustainable
citations: Local PDF · GenAI Collective Chapter Startup FAQ.pdf · chunk 30

blocks.heading: 180+ chapters across 40+ countries
blocks.body: 400+ volunteer organizers, with a community that includes everyone from solo founders to teams at the biggest AI labs in the world.

blocks.heading: Start a chapter in your city
blocks.body: You can also attend an event, volunteer to organize, or pitch a Byte article.
